title: Department store clarifies source of mail-out, and reviews opt-out policies and suppression mechanisms
summary: An individual complained that a department store, with which he had a credit card account, disclosed his personal information to a third party, namely, a company that offered credit monitoring services. The complainant had received a mail solicitation from this third party, which appeared to be supported by the department store but sent o...
